_comment: zh-TW translationese WARN patterns (see references/zh-prose.md). P1 merges this into the book's lint config for every zh-TW book, AFTER the form fragment. IMPORTANT: deep_merge REPLACES lists, so this list must also carry the language pack's own vocab_regex_warn entries (currently the 算法 rule) — dropping them would silently disable pack rules. All entries here are WARN-only: style needs a human eye, never a mass replace.

vocab_regex_warn.replace: 直接用動詞（進行分析→分析）
